comment_count.description: Published comments authored by this actor.

follower_count.description: How many actors follow this actor.

following_count.description: How many actors this actor follows.

post_count.description: Published posts authored by this actor.

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last counter update.

dst_actor_id.description: Destination agora actor UUID (the one being followed / muted / blocked / restricted).

payload.description: Optional free-form payload stored on the edge (e.g. mute reason).

src_actor_id.description: Source agora actor UUID (the one performing the follow / mute / block / restrict).

shadow_banned_at.description: ISO timestamp the shadow ban was applied, or null.

shadow_banned_reason.description: Moderator note attached to the ban.

shadow_banned_until.description: ISO timestamp the shadow ban auto-expires, or null for indefinite.

rank.description: PG `ts_rank` score on the (display_name A, external_id B, bio C) tsvector. Higher = more relevant.

data.description: Up to `limit` (default 20, max 50) ranked hits. Not paginated in v1; results are bounded by `limit`.

created.description: `true` on first call; `false` on idempotent retry.

reaction_counts.description: Live denormalised counts on the comment after this write.

actor_id.description: The new member — agora actor UUID.

caller_actor_id.description: Group admin performing the add — agora actor UUID.

duration_hours.description: Hours until auto-restore. Omit for indefinite.

approver_actor_id.description: The post-author — must equal the post.actor_id.

actor_id.description: Agora actor UUID who saved the post.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the bookmark was created.

created.description: `true` on first call (row inserted); `false` on idempotent retry of an existing bookmark.

created_at.description: When the close-friend edge was created.

reaction_counts.description: Live denormalised counts after the delete (or current counts if the reaction was already absent).

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the row was inserted.

depth.description: Thread depth — 0 for top-level, 1 for first reply, etc. Capped per community.

parent_id.description: Parent comment UUID for replies; `null` for top-level.

status.description: Lifecycle status. `removed` rows are hidden from public reads.

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last update.

visibility.description: `public` (default) is visible to anyone who can read the post; `author_only` is DM-style (post-author + comment-author only).

actors_last_7d.description: Actors created in the last 7 days.

comments_last_7d.description: Comments created in the last 7 days (any status).

computed_at.description: ISO timestamp this rollup was computed at.

posts_last_7d.description: Posts created in the last 7 days (any status).

app_id.description: Heimdall app UUID this community wraps; `null` for standalone communities.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the row was inserted.

settings.description: Per-community settings blob (ranking, max_comment_depth, auto_hide_flag_threshold, reaction_types).

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last update.

last_read_at.description: ISO timestamp of the participant's last read marker; `null` until first /read.

muted.description: When true, dm_new_message notifications are suppressed for this participant.

role.description: Role on this conversation. `admin` for groups can add / remove members and rename.

created_by.description: Agora actor UUID of the group founder; null for legacy / 1-on-1.

last_message_at.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent message (or conversation create when no messages yet).

actor_id.description: Agora actor UUID who is bookmarking — the customer-backend supplies the end-user identity here.

member_actor_id.description: Member agora actor UUID (the actor being added).

owner_actor_id.description: Owner agora actor UUID (the actor whose close-friends list this is).

actor_id.description: Agora actor UUID who authors the comment.

parent_id.description: Parent comment UUID for replies. Omit for a top-level comment.

visibility.description: Visibility scope. `author_only` = DM-style (post author + comment author only).

app_id.description: Optional Heimdall App UUID this community wraps. When supplied, the app must be owned by the calling workspace (cross-tenant gate). Omit to create a standalone community with no Heimdall integration — actor identity is then managed entirely by the customer.

description.example: Where our customers post stories and threads.

display_name.description: Display name shown in the console and on responses.

slug.description: URL-friendly community slug. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens (3-64 chars).

actor_id.description: Agora actor UUID opening the conversation.

actor_ids.description: For groups (`kind="group"`): initial members (excluding the creator). Required when kind=group. Capped by `community.settings.max_group_conversation_size` (default 50).

name.description: Optional group display name. Ignored for 1-on-1.

recipient_actor_id.description: For 1-on-1 (`kind="direct"`): the other participant — agora actor UUID. Required when kind=direct.

created.description: `true` if the edge was created on this call; `false` on idempotent retry of an existing edge.

reason.example: Spam — same link posted 6 times in 5 minutes.

reporter_actor_id.description: Agora actor UUID who is reporting the content.

target_id.description: UUID of the post or comment being flagged.

target_kind.description: What kind of object is being flagged.

tag.description: Lowercase tag (without `#`). Must already exist in the community directory.

expires_at.description: Optional expiry (ISO timestamp in the future).

term.description: Term to mute. 1..200 chars after trim.

actor_id.description: Agora actor UUID who authors the post (returned from POST /actors).

attributes.description: Free-form attributes blob. Polls live here at `attributes.poll`.

body.description: Body markdown / plain text (up to 50000 chars).

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 expiry timestamp. Used by stories (24h disappearing).

kind.description: Post kind. Free-form short label; common values: text, link, image, story.

scheduled_for.description: Required when status='scheduled'. ISO timestamp at least 30 seconds in the future. The PostSchedulerCron promotes scheduled posts to published once now() >= scheduled_for.

source_post_id.description: For `kind='quote'` ONLY: the source post being quoted. Reposts use the dedicated POST /posts/:postId/repost route instead. Validation: when `kind='quote'`, both `source_post_id` and a non-empty `body` are required.

status.description: Initial status. Defaults to `published`. Pass `draft` to save unpublished; pass `scheduled` with a future `scheduled_for` to defer publication. Scheduled posts are invisible to everyone except the author until the per-minute scheduler promotes them.

actor_id.description: Reposting actor UUID — the customer-backend supplies the end-user identity here.

created.description: `true` on first call; `false` on idempotent retry of an existing repost.

repost.description: The newly-created (or existing) repost post row.

event_types.description: Event types to subscribe to. Currently supported: `post.created`, `post.updated`, `post.reaction.created`, `repost.created`, `comment.created`, `comment.updated`, `comment.reaction.created`, `edge.follow.created`.

consecutive_failures.description: Consecutive failed attempts since the last success.

disabled_at.description: ISO timestamp when the webhook was auto-disabled (or null if active).

disabled_reason.description: Reason the dispatcher auto-disabled the row.

event_types.description: Subscribed event types. Each item is one of the agora event names (e.g. `post.created`, `comment.created`, `edge.follow.created`).

last_failure_at.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent non-2xx response.

last_success_at.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent 2xx response.

signing_secret.description: Full plaintext HMAC signing secret. Returned ONCE — store it; subsequent reads only expose the last-4 hint.

signing_secret_hint.description: Last 4 chars of the signing secret. Use the full secret returned by create / rotate to verify the X-Pcft-Signature header.

has_more.description: Whether more pages exist after this one.

next_cursor.description: Opaque base64url cursor; null when no further pages.

caller_actor_id.description: Caller — agora actor UUID. Must equal the list owner.

sender_id.description: The sender — must match the message's sender_id.

attempt_number.description: Attempt number. Always 1 in v1 (no retry).

error_message.description: Free-form error string. Null on success.

event_id.description: Stable event id (carried in the request body as `id`).

request_body.description: Signed request body that was sent.

response_status.description: HTTP status code (null on transport / SSRF failure).

deleted_at.description: ISO timestamp when soft-deleted; `null` until then.

edited_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last edit; `null` for never-edited.

created.description: True when this call inserted the row; false on idempotent retry.

reaction_counts.description: Denormalised map of reaction type → count after the change.
Denormalised map of reaction type → count after the change.

deleted_at.description: ISO timestamp when soft-deleted; `null` until then.

edited_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last edit; `null` for never-edited.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the draft was created.

expires_at.description: Optional expires_at carried into the published post.

pinned.description: Pinned flag carried into the published post.

reaction_counts.description: Empty for drafts (engagement begins at publish).

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last update.

visibility.description: Visibility scope chosen at draft time. Applies once promoted to published.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the edge was created.

dst_post_id.description: Destination post UUID (for reaction / save edges).

kind.description: Edge kind. `follow`, `mute`, `block`, `save`, or `reaction:<type>` for post reactions.

payload.description: Free-form payload stored on the edge (e.g. mute reason).

statusCode.description: HTTP status code echoed in the body.

code.description: Stable error code for programmatic handling. Optional — newer routes set it where the message alone is ambiguous.

message.description: Human-readable error message. May be a class-validator array on 400.

statusCode.description: HTTP status code echoed in the body.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the post was created.

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last update.

visibility.description: Visibility scope; the feed is already filtered to what the requester can see.

pagination.description: Cursor encodes `(score, id)` for `ranked` feeds and `(created_at, id)` for `chronological` feeds. Cursors are NOT interchangeable between modes.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the row was inserted.

reason.description: Free-text reason; empty string when none provided.
reason.example: Spam — same link posted 6 times in 5 minutes.

status.description: Lifecycle. `open` is in the queue; admins close to `dismissed` or `actioned`.

target_id.description: UUID of the post or comment being flagged.

target_kind.description: What kind of object is being flagged.

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last update.

first_used_at.description: ISO timestamp the tag first appeared in this community.

post_count.description: Number of currently-published posts using the tag.

followed_at.description: ISO timestamp the follow was created.

first_used_at.description: ISO timestamp the tag first appeared in this community.

before.description: Optional ISO timestamp; only flips rows older than this. Omit to flip all unread.

updated.description: Number of rows whose `read_at` flipped from null to now().

read_through.description: ISO timestamp. Messages with `created_at <= read_through` count as read. Omit to mark every message up to now().

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the source row was created.

post_id.description: Parent post UUID. Always set, including for comment mentions, so the client can deep-link.

source_id.description: UUID of the source row — post id when source=post, comment id when source=comment.

data.description: Interleaved post + comment mentions, newest-first. Cursor is opaque base64url(JSON({created_at, source, source_id})).

action.description: Action to apply. `hide`/`remove` transition target status; `unhide`/`restore` reverse them. `warn`/`ban` are audit-only. `dismiss` closes the flag with no target change.

notes.description: Optional moderator notes attached to the audit row (up to 2000 chars).

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the action was recorded.

flag_id.description: Flag UUID this action closed; `null` for unsolicited mod actions.

moderator_account_id.description: PlatformUser account UUID of the moderator.

target_id.description: UUID of the targeted post / comment.

has_more.description: Whether more pages exist after this one.

next_cursor.description: Opaque base64url cursor for the next page; `null` when no further pages.

data.description: One row per known NotificationKind. Kinds the actor has not explicitly toggled report `enabled=true` and an epoch `updated_at`, so the client always sees the full catalogue with effective state.

enabled.description: When `false`, the producer silently skips notifications of this kind for this actor. Default `true`.

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last update. Synthesised entries (no explicit row) report epoch.

actor_id.description: Actor who triggered the event. Never equals `recipient_actor_id`.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the row was inserted.

read_at.description: ISO timestamp; null while the row is unread.

recipient_actor_id.description: Actor whose inbox this row lives in.

target_id.description: id of the actor / post / comment the event happened on.

target_kind.description: Switches what `target_id` references. `actor` for follow; `post` for reaction / comment_on_post; `comment` for reply_to_comment.

has_more.description: `true` when at least one more page exists. Mirrors `next_cursor !== null`; published as a separate field so SDKs can drive a `while` loop without parsing the cursor.

next_cursor.description: Opaque base64url cursor for the next page; `null` when no further pages.

last_read_at.description: ISO timestamp of the participant's last read marker.

muted.description: When true, dm_new_message notifications are suppressed for this participant.

count.description: Number of votes recorded for this option.

index.description: Zero-based index into the original options list.

label.description: Option label as supplied at post creation.

post_id.description: Post UUID the poll lives on.

total_votes.description: Sum of counts across every option.

body.description: Body markdown / plain text (up to 50000 chars).

comment_count.description: Comment count, denormalised on the post row.

created_at.description: ISO timestamp the row was inserted.

edit_count.description: Number of edits applied; equals the count of post_revision rows.

edited_at.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent edit (body/title/attributes change). Null when never edited.

expires_at.description: ISO timestamp; `null` = no expiry. Stories typically set this 24h ahead.

kind.description: Free-form post kind. Common: text, link, image, story.

pinned.description: When `true`, surfaces in the author's highlights endpoint regardless of expiry.

quote_count.description: Denormalised count of currently-published quote posts.

reaction_counts.description: Map of reaction type to count, denormalised on the post row for cheap feed reads.

source_post_id.description: For kind='repost' / 'quote': the source post UUID.

status.description: Lifecycle status. `removed` rows are hidden from public reads.

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last update.

view_count.description: Denormalised impression count, bumped via POST /posts/views.

body.description: Body text BEFORE this edit landed.

post_id.description: Post UUID this revision belongs to.

rank.description: PG ts_rank score on the (title A, body B) tsvector. Higher = more relevant. Returned even when order='recent' so clients can render a relevance badge.

data.description: Up to `limit` (default 20, max 50) hits. Not paginated in v1.

reaction_counts.description: Denormalised reaction counts after the write.

created.description: `true` on first call; `false` on idempotent retry.

reaction_counts.description: Denormalised reaction counts after the write.

post_ids.description: UUIDs of posts that became visible to the viewer in this batch. Capped at 200 to keep the payload sensible — the server will silently skip ids that aren't in the community or have been removed.

caller_actor_id.description: Agora actor UUID of the acting party. Equal to the target for self-leave.
Agora actor UUID of the renaming admin.

name.description: New display name. Pass null or empty to clear.

data.description: Page of repost post rows, each carrying the reposting actor_id.

repost_count.description: Reposts of this post (always 0 for the repost row itself).

status.description: Lifecycle status. Search only surfaces `active` actors.

body.description: Message body. Required when `kind="text"`. 1..10000 chars after trim.

has_unviewed.description: True when the requester has not viewed the latest story.

latest_story_created_at.description: When the most recent unexpired-or-pinned story was created.

story_count.description: Total unexpired-or-pinned stories from this author.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Suggestions only surface `active` actors.

reason.description: Why this candidate surfaced. `followed_by_friends` is the friend-of-a-friend signal; `top_in_community` is the cold-start fallback used when FoF doesn't fill the requested limit.

score.description: For `followed_by_friends`: number of the requester's followees who follow this candidate. For `top_in_community`: the candidate's `follower_count`.

data.description: Ordered candidates. FoF candidates are returned first (highest count first); cold-start fallbacks fill any remaining slots up to the requested limit.

count.description: Number of unread notifications for the actor.
Number of unread incoming messages across every conversation the actor participates in.

caller_actor_id.description: Caller — agora actor UUID. Must equal the list owner.

status.description: Direct status transition. Prefer the moderation lane for `hidden`/`removed`.

actor_id.description: The participant whose row is being updated.

muted.description: Mute / unmute on the caller's participant row.

caller_actor_id.description: The admin performing the role change — agora actor UUID.

sender_id.description: The sender — must match the message's sender_id.

read.description: `true` to mark read, `false` to mark unread.

enabled.description: `true` to receive notifications of this kind, `false` to mute. Default behaviour (no row) is `true`.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 expiry timestamp; pass null to clear.

pinned.description: Toggle pinned status (used by highlights / stories).

scheduled_for.description: ISO-8601 publish-at timestamp. Updating only valid while the post is `status="scheduled"`. Pass null to clear (typically only the scheduler does this on promotion).

status.description: Direct status transition. Pass `published` to promote a `draft` or `scheduled`. Prefer the moderation lane for `hidden`/`removed`. Transitions to/from `draft`/`scheduled` other than to `published` are 422.

display_name.description: Display name shown in feeds / mentions.

external_id.description: Customer-side identifier (your user id). Idempotency key for upsert; unique per community.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata blob (e.g. plan tier, internal flags).

created.description: `true` on first call (row was inserted), `false` on subsequent upserts that updated an existing row.

consecutive_failures.description: Consecutive failed attempts since the last success.

disabled_at.description: ISO timestamp when the webhook was auto-disabled (or null if active).

disabled_reason.description: Reason the dispatcher auto-disabled the row.

event_types.description: Subscribed event types. Each item is one of the agora event names (e.g. `post.created`, `comment.created`, `edge.follow.created`).

last_failure_at.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent non-2xx response.

last_success_at.description: ISO timestamp of the most recent 2xx response.

signing_secret_hint.description: Last 4 chars of the signing secret. Use the full secret returned by create / rotate to verify the X-Pcft-Signature header.

info.description: Social-as-a-Service backend. Generic actor / object / edge primitives. Two callers: PlatformUser admin (cookie/JWT) on /v1/workspaces/..., and customer-backend (PAK + X-Acting-As) on /v1/apps/:appSlug/...
info.title: Social API

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Opaque cursor from the previous page's `pagination.next_cursor`.
parameters.name: cursor

404.description: Community not found in the PAK's workspace.

get.summary: List actors in a community. 50 per page by default (max 200) — paginate with the cursor returned in `pagination.next_cursor` while `pagination.has_more` is true.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

201.description: Created (`created: true`) or upserted (`created: false`); the actor row is returned in both cases.

404.description: Community not found in the PAK's workspace.

post.summary: Upsert an actor by external_id. Creates on first call, updates on subsequent calls with the same external_id. Idempotent on `(community, external_id)`. Note: omitted fields on a follow-up call are overwritten with the new body — pass every field you want to keep on each call.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Customer-supplied identifier for the user (the `external_id` you upserted with).
parameters.name: externalId

404.description: No actor with that external_id in this community.

get.summary: Look up an actor by the customer-supplied external_id.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

404.description: Actor not found in this community.

delete.summary: Delete an actor. Hard delete — cascades to every post, comment, edge, flag, and notification it owns.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Agora actor UUID (the id returned by upsert).
parameters.name: actorId

404.description: Actor not found in this community.

get.summary: Get an actor by its agora UUID.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

400.description: Validation failure or invalid status value.

404.description: Actor not found in this community.

patch.summary: Update actor profile fields. Pass only the fields you want to change.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

get.summary: List actors this actor has blocked.

get.description: Bookmarks are private — only the bookmarker should see their own list. The PAK lane has no end-user principal; the customer's backend must scope this call to the right end-user before exposing the response. Bookmarks against posts whose visibility has narrowed since (or which have been deleted) stay in the list — we don't cross-check post visibility on read of bookmarks.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

404.description: Community or actor not found (or belongs to a different community).

get.summary: List the actor's bookmarks. Cursor-paginated newest-first.

get.description: Returns the actors on `externalId`'s close-friends list, with denormalised actor metadata. Cursor paginated.
get.summary: List the close-friends members of an actor.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

404.description: Not found (or belongs to a different community / workspace).

get.summary: Denormalised counters for one actor (followers, following, posts, comments, blocks).

get.description: Drafts are visible only via this endpoint — they're stripped from public feeds, lists, and `getById`. The PAK lane has no end-user principal, so the customer's backend is responsible for ensuring `actorId` matches the end-user behind the request before exposing the response.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Agora actor UUID whose drafts to list.
parameters.name: actorId

404.description: Community or actor not found (or belongs to a different community).

get.summary: List the actor's drafts (status='draft'). Cursor-paginated newest-first.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Viewer agora actor UUID — feed is candidate-pooled to their follow-graph.
parameters.name: actorId

parameters.description: Opaque cursor; not interchangeable between `ranked` and `chronological` modes.
parameters.name: cursor

400.description: INVALID_ORDER (unknown `order` value) or INVALID_CURSOR (cursor shape mismatch).

get.summary: Feed for an actor: their own posts + posts from actors they follow, with blocks excluded. Default order is `ranked` (recency + engagement + follow-graph signals); pass `order=chronological` to get the time-ordered feed. 50/page (max 200). The cursor shape differs between orders — passing a chronological cursor with `order=ranked` returns 400 INVALID_CURSOR.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

get.summary: List the actors who follow this actor.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

get.summary: List the actors this actor follows.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

get.summary: List the hashtags an actor follows. Cursor-paginated newest-first by followed_at.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Agora actor UUID who is following.
parameters.name: actorId

400.description: Tag fails the lowercase + alphanum + underscore + 1..32 rule.

404.description: Community, actor, or hashtag not found.

post.summary: Follow a hashtag on behalf of an actor. Idempotent — re-follow refreshes the followed_at timestamp but doesn't error.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

delete.summary: Unfollow a hashtag. Idempotent — 204 either way.

get.description: Pinned posts appear here regardless of their `expires_at`. Visibility still applies — pass `requester_id` to surface non-public pinned posts the requester is allowed to see. Without that param, only `public` pinned rows are returned (legacy-safe default). Cursor-paginated on `(created_at DESC, id DESC)`.

parameters.description: Agora actor UUID whose highlights to list.
parameters.name: actorId

parameters.description: Requester's external_id. Without it, only public pinned posts surface.
parameters.name: requester_id

get.summary: List the actor's pinned posts (highlights).

get.description: Cursor-paginated, newest-first. Interleaves post + comment mentions in a single feed; the `source` field discriminates which surface each row came from. The `post_id` field is always set so the client can deep-link, even for comment mentions.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Agora actor UUID whose mentions to list.
parameters.name: actorId

404.description: Community or actor not found (or belongs to a different community).

get.summary: List every place this actor has been @-mentioned (posts + comments).
List the actor's currently-active muted terms.

post.summary: Add (or refresh) a muted term for the actor. Re-posting the same `term` updates the scope + expires_at.

delete.summary: Remove a muted term. Idempotent — 204 either way.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

get.summary: List actors this actor has muted.

get.description: Returns one row per known NotificationKind so the client UI can render every toggle without a separate catalogue lookup. Synthesised rows carry an epoch `updated_at`; explicit rows carry the real timestamp.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

404.description: Community or actor not found (or belongs to a different community).

get.summary: List the actor's per-kind notification preferences. Synthesises `enabled=true` defaults for kinds the actor has not explicitly toggled.

patch.description: Idempotent upsert. Pass `{ enabled: false }` to mute, `{ enabled: true }` to re-enable. Cache is invalidated on write so the next NotificationService.tryEmit picks up the change immediately. Returns the resulting preference row.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

400.description: Body validation failed, or `kind` is not a known NotificationKind.

404.description: Community or actor not found (or belongs to a different community).

patch.summary: Set a single notification-kind preference for the actor.

get.description: Reverse-chronological inbox. Pass `unread_only=true` to filter to unread rows only. Cursor encodes `(created_at, id)` and round-trips through the response. Default page size 50, max 200. Suppression of self-actions and blocked-actor pairs happens at write time, so every row returned here has already passed those filters.

parameters.description: Opaque base64url cursor returned by the prior page.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: When `true`, returns only rows where `read_at IS NULL`.
parameters.name: unread_only

parameters.description: Filter slice. `inbox` (default) hides suppressed rows; `requests` shows only suppressed rows (notifications from actors the viewer has restricted); `all` merges both.
parameters.name: status

404.description: Community or actor not found (also returned for cross-workspace probes).

get.summary: List notifications for an actor (newest first).

post.description: Single bulk write. Optional `before` ISO timestamp scopes to rows older than that — useful for "mark all older than today as read" UX. Returns the number of rows that flipped.

200.description: Bulk update applied; `updated` is the row count.

400.description: `before` is not a valid ISO timestamp.

post.summary: Mark every unread notification for the actor as read.

get.description: Cheap badge endpoint backed by a partial index — safe to poll at the cadence of an in-product notification bell.
get.summary: Count unread notifications for an actor.

patch.description: Idempotent: marking an already-read row read again is a no-op 204. Returns 404 if the notification belongs to a different actor.

parameters.description: Notification UUID returned from the list endpoint.
parameters.name: notificationId

404.description: Notification not found, or belongs to a different actor.

patch.summary: Mark a single notification as read or unread.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

get.summary: List actors this actor has restricted.

get.description: Scheduled posts are invisible to everyone except the author until the per-minute PostSchedulerCron promotes them. Same end-user authorization rules as drafts: the PAK lane trusts the customer-backend to gate the caller.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Agora actor UUID whose scheduled posts to list.
parameters.name: actorId

get.summary: List the actor's scheduled posts (status='scheduled'), ordered soonest-to-publish first. Cursor-paginated.

get.description: Includes the requester themselves and every actor they follow. Ordered by latest story timestamp. Capped at 200 entries (no cursor in v1; tray is bounded by follow-graph in normal usage). Returns `has_unviewed=true` when the requester has not recorded a `view` edge against the author's most recent story.
get.summary: Story tray for an actor — one entry per author with at least one unexpired or pinned story.

get.description: Friend-of-a-friend signal first (people the requester's followees also follow), with a cold-start fallback to top actors in the community by follower count when FoF underfills the limit. Excludes self, existing follows / mutes / blocks, and actors who have blocked the requester. Cached 1h per (actor, limit).

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

parameters.description: Agora actor UUID for whom to compute suggestions.

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.
parameters.name: communityId

201.description: Block edge created (or returned via idempotent retry); follows + mutes between the pair are torn down in the same transaction.

post.summary: Block another actor. Removes any existing follows/mutes between the two in either direction (one transaction).

parameters.description: Agora community UUID. Must belong to the PAK's workspace.

delete.summary: Unblock. Idempotent — 204 either way. Does NOT restore prior follows / mutes (the block tear-down is one-way).

post.description: Idempotent on `(community, owner, member)`. 422 on self-add. 409 if a block exists between the pair in either direction. Visibility-`close_friends` posts authored by `owner` become visible to `member` after this call.

409.description: Block in place between owner and member.

422.description: Cannot add yourself as a close friend.

post.summary: Add a member to an actor's close-friends list.

delete.description: Idempotent: 204 whether or not the edge exists. After removal, `close_friends`-visibility posts by `owner` no longer surface to `member`.

204.description: Removed (or was not in the list).

delete.summary: Remove a member from an actor's close-friends list.

Does NOT fire a notification — the author sees views via the viewers endpoint instead.

Pass `requester_id` to filter out actors the requester has muted or blocked, and actors who have blocked the requester. Trigram fuzzy matching is intentionally out of scope — that's a follow-up.

get.description: Postgres FTS over a generated tsvector column on the post table (title A + body B, simple locale). `order='relevance'` (default) ranks by ts_rank; `order='recent'` keeps the FTS filter but orders by created_at desc. Filters out drafts / removed / hidden / expired posts. Pass `requester_id` to drop posts authored by anyone the requester has muted / blocked, or who has blocked the requester. Without `requester_id`, only posts with `visibility='public'` surface.

delete.summary: Remove a shadow ban. No-op if not currently shadow-banned.

post.summary: Apply a shadow ban to an actor. The actor sees their own content normally; everyone else sees nothing from them. Pass `duration_hours` for a timed ban or omit for indefinite.

200.description: Page of audit entries with next-cursor and has-more.

404.description: Community not found in this workspace.

get.summary: Append-only audit of moderator actions in this community. 50/page (max 200), cursor-paginated.

404.description: Community not found in this workspace.

get.summary: List every conversation in the community, most-recent-activity first. Moderation-only.
List every message in a conversation. Moderation-only.

200.description: Page of flags with next-cursor and has-more.

404.description: Community not found in this workspace.

get.summary: List flags in this community. Filter by ?status=open|dismissed|actioned. 50/page (max 200), cursor-paginated.

201.description: Action recorded; target status updated where applicable.

409.description: Flag already actioned/dismissed and the requested action would be a no-op.

post.summary: Apply a moderation action to a flag. Records an audit entry and updates the target post/comment status.

get.summary: List currently shadow-banned actors in this community. 50/page (max 200), cursor-paginated newest-ban first.
